creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #3)

--disable-gpu still works for me on falkon so I think the issue is that otter-browser now requires you to add some special keyword to pass arguments for qt5-webengine.

You can try "--qt-flag disable-gpu": this is what works on qutebrowser.

Maybe it would have been better to open a new PR for the issue. If you want to open a new PR, feel free to CC me if you want. If you stay on this PR, then I think you should at least reopen it.
